title: Teltonika TRB142 LTE RS232 Gateway
description: Robust and reliable RS232 to 4G LTE Cat1 IoT gateway . Linux based advanced firmware with firewall and VPN functionality is perfect for upgrading connectivity for existing or new equipment TRB142 LTE RS232 Gateway is a small, lightweight and energy efficient IoT device equipped with mission-critical LTE capabilities , an RS232 serial communication port and a Linux environment offering a high degree of customization, designed to do IoT projects with ease Device LTE antenna with cable Power adapter (EU) USB cable
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency LTE, 2G (GSM), 3G (GSM), 4G (GSM) Type of antenna Detachable Detachable antennas 1 Integrated 4G/LTE radio part Yes 4G/LTE bands support (1) 2100 MHz, (3) 1800 MHz, (7) 2600 MHz, (8) 900 MHz, (20) 800 MHz, (28) 700 MHz Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (1) SMA female Serial port RS-232 SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 1 USB Yes Power Power type 4-pin automotive Max. power consumption [W] 5 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Protection class IP30 Design Desktop Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 135 Width [mm] 75 Height [mm] 25 Depth [mm] 64 Hardware CPU ARM Cortex A7 CPU frequency [MHz] 1200 Internal storage [MB] 512 RAM [MB] 128
